title: Orientation & Documentary
subtitle: The primary goal of this engaging session was to introduce our incoming members to the essence of Optica, provide insight into our upcoming events and treat participants to an enlightening documentary
description:
Title: Optica Unveiled- Orientation Session and Documentary Screening Event 
 Objective: The primary goal of this engaging session was to introduce our incoming members to the essence of Optica, provide insight into our upcoming events and treat participants to an enlightening documentary. Benefits of Joining the Event: The event successfully achieved its objective by providing freshers with a holistic understanding of Optica, fostering a sense of belonging, and igniting enthusiasm for future engagement and active participation in the society’s initiatives.
location: Bharati Vidyapeeth's College of Engineering, New Delhi
highlights: Orientation session for freshers to understand the society’s activities.
Encouragement for active participation and community involvement.
Boosted enthusiasm for future engagement and learning.
